title: llm_plan_task plan document (v1)
description: Structural contract for plans accepted by validate_plan in actions/lib/plan_model.py. Size limits (max steps, string lengths, action_parameters depth/size) are enforced in code only; see README and plan_model module constants.

version.description: Format version; if omitted, validate_plan treats the plan as version "1".

id.description: Optional; missing or blank ids are assigned step-N by validate_plan.

description.description: Optional; omit or use empty string. null is rejected by validate_plan.

action_ref.description: Optional StackStorm action reference pack.action (non-empty tokens, ASCII letters/digits/underscore). Leading/trailing whitespace is stripped by validate_plan; whitespace-only is treated as absent.

action_parameters.description: JSON object only; requires non-empty action_ref in validate_plan. Nesting depth, key counts, and serialized size are capped in code.
